setup_cmd: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential gcc-multilib g++-multilib python3 python3-serial
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gcc-arm-none-eabi libnewlib-arm-none-eabi python3 python3-serial
build_cmd: make BOARD=samr21-xpro -C examples/basic/hello-world && mkdir -p .membrowse-ld && cp cpu/cortexm_common/ldscripts/*.ld .membrowse-ld/

setup_cmd: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gcc-arm-none-eabi libnewlib-arm-none-eabi python3 python3-serial
build_cmd: make BOARD=nucleo-f401re -C examples/basic/hello-world && mkdir -p .membrowse-ld && cp cpu/stm32/ldscripts/*.ld cpu/cortexm_common/ldscripts/*.ld .membrowse-ld/

setup_cmd: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gcc-arm-none-eabi libnewlib-arm-none-eabi python3 python3-serial
build_cmd: make BOARD=nucleo-f767zi -C examples/basic/hello-world && mkdir -p .membrowse-ld && cp cpu/stm32/ldscripts/*.ld cpu/cortexm_common/ldscripts/*.ld .membrowse-ld/

setup_cmd: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y python3 python3-serial wget unzip xz-utils && bash dist/tools/esptools/install.sh esp32
